---
title: "Data Sources"
---

The table below lists all external raw data sources used in the pipeline, the current file name in `raw_data/`, the last download date, and the dofile that first uses each source.

| Source | Download | Last downloaded | Used by |
|---|---|---|---|
| OECD Global Revenue Statistics | [OECD website](https://www.oecd.org/en/data/datasets) | Jan 2026 | 1_1_revenue_oecd |
| IMF Government Finance Statistics | [IMF website](https://data.imf.org/en) | Apr 2025 | 1_3_revenue_imf |
| WID (World Inequality Database) | [WID website](https://wid.world/) | 2026 vintage | 1_9_revenue_nni_1_collect, 2_1_factorshares_importwid_2026 |
| ICTD Government Revenue Dataset | [ICTD website](https://www.ictd.ac/dataset) | Mar 2026 | 1_5_revenue_ictd |
| UN National Accounts (SNA 2025) | [UN Stats website](https://unstats.un.org/UNSDWebsite/) | 2025 vintage | 2_3_factorshares_importsna2024_1import |
| OECD SNA — China | [OECD Data Explorer](https://data-explorer.oecd.org/) | 2026 vintage | 2_4_factorshares_import_chn |
| PYZ (Piketty-Yang-Zucman 2019) | CHN_raw_1_PYZdata | Static (covers to 2021) | 2_4_factorshares_import_chn |
| IMF WEO GDP | [IMF WEO website](https://www.imf.org/en/publications/sprolls/world-economic-outlook-databases) | 2025 vintage | 1_5_revenue_ictd |
| Historical Archives (HA) | raw_data/HA/*.dta | Fixed historical | 1_2_revenue_ha |
| INSEE tax credits — France | [INSEE website](https://www.insee.fr/fr/statistiques) | Updated per vintage | 3_6_ETR_countrychecks |

::: {.callout-note}
**WID note:** `wid2026_basic_raw.dta` is the active file for the 2026 update. `wid_basic_raw.dta` is the pre-2026 vintage retained for reference in `2_3_factorshares_importsna2024_2clean.do`.
:::

::: {.callout-note}
**IMF GFS note:** The April 2025 download covers data through 2023, which is the current end of the panel. The March 2025 online release is the correct current vintage.
:::
